name: Peanut Blossoms
recipeIngredient: 1 can Eagle Brand Sw Cond Milk
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 350°F. In a large mixing bowl, beat together the milk, peanut butter, egg, and vanilla until smooth. Add the Bisquick and mix well. Chill for at least 1 hour. Shape into 1-inch balls. Bake for 6-8 minutes, or until lightly browned but not overbaked. Press Kiss in the center of each cookie immediately after baking. Store tightly covered at room temperature.
